meta.note: PROPOSED tailoring (Phase D). Every bullet is a selection/rephrasing of a fact already in data/experience.json — no new facts minted. Review and accept before compiling. Job emphasis: spatial data fusion, multi-sensor data, ML classification/regression/tracking, large-scale geospatial data, Python geo stack, production deployment.

bullets.label: Project Lead
bullets.text: Pan-Arctic thaw-slump mapping --- deep learning on multi-source satellite imagery to detect and quantify features at continental scale

bullets.label: Sensor fusion
bullets.text: Integrated multiple satellite imagery types with field observations into ML workflows, improving feature-detection accuracy

bullets.label: Production scale
bullets.text: Optimised deep-learning model inference over Arctic-scale geospatial data on Google Cloud Platform

bullets.label: Geospatial analytics
bullets.text: Produced pan-Arctic statistics from large-scale geospatial datasets

bullets.label: ML modelling
bullets.text: Computer-vision wildfire mapping and machine-learning wildfire prediction from environmental variables (classification \& regression)

bullets.label: Time-series
bullets.text: Carbon-flux time-series imputation and multi-domain climate time-series prediction

bullets.label: Foundation models
bullets.text: Applied vision foundation models (SAM, location embeddings) to satellite image segmentation
Professional data-science fellowship in machine learning and AI with an industry client placement
Computational methods for multiphase fluid flow; deep-learning image segmentation for digital rocks
